nodes.description: The value of this node should be a policy name.

children.name: AppPathNameMatchCondition
children.description: Specifies the name of an application to be used to match the network traffic, such as application.exe or %ProgramFiles%\application.exe.

children.name: DSCPAction
children.description: The differentiated services code point (DSCP) value to apply to matching network traffic. Valid values are 0-63.

children.name: DestinationPortMatchCondition
children.description: Specifies a single port or a range of ports to be used to match the network traffic. Valid values are [first port number]-[last port number] or [port number].

children.name: IPProtocolMatchCondition
children.description: Specifies the IP protocol used to match the network traffic. Valid values are 0: Both TCP and UDP (default), 1: TCP, 2: UDP.

children.name: PriorityValue8021Action
children.description: The IEEE 802.1p value to apply to matching network traffice. Valid values are 0-7.

children.name: SourcePortMatchCondition
children.description: Specifies a single port or a range of ports to be used to match the network traffic. Valid values are [first port number]-[last port number] or [port number].
